nodes.label: JWT Authentication
nodes.rationale: Token stored in Android EncryptedSharedPreferences with AES-256, sent as WebSocket query parameter and Authorization header; 401 triggers user notification and reconnection.

nodes.label: Supervisor LangGraph
nodes.rationale: Checkpointed StateGraph with Mongo saver supporting interrupt/resume; owns intent classification, memory fetch and routing to the 6 workflow graphs so interrupts bind correctly.

nodes.label: Voice Session State Machine
nodes.rationale: Idle -> Speaking(prompt) -> Listening -> Processing -> Speaking(response) -> Idle; auto-stop after 2s silence, 7s no-speech timeout, back button cancels; designed so voice conversations feel seamless.

nodes.label: Memory Engine (memory_engine)
nodes.rationale: Consolidation pass made memory_engine.save_session() the SOLE per-turn memory pipeline, removing legacy MemorySaga call paths to eliminate double LLM entity extraction and double Pinecone writes.

nodes.label: Prefetch Engine
nodes.rationale: Bounded queue (maxsize=50) added in Phase 2 to prevent memory leak on high traffic; non-blocking background entity context loading.

nodes.label: Session Manager (backend)
nodes.rationale: Its 5s/45s batch retry loop perpetually re-ran entity extraction on permanently partial_sync sessions while Neo4j was down — root cause of chronic Groq TPD exhaustion; fixed by short-circuiting when graph_service returns None.

nodes.label: SagaRetryWorker
nodes.rationale: Polls every 30s for pending embedding/neo4j statuses; exponential backoff 30s->60s->120s, dead letter after 3 failures with critical alert.

nodes.label: Memory Orchestrator (RRF read flow)
nodes.rationale: Read flow with RRF fusion under a hard 1.5s asyncio.wait_for timeout; Pinecone search filtered by session_ids when Neo4j returns them (graph-guided vector search).

nodes.label: LLM Factory (Groq primary + Gemini fallback)
nodes.rationale: Single LLM entry point replacing llm_router; Gemini fallback had never worked due to a dead gemini-1.5-flash model name, fixed during Day 5 memory-proof debugging.

nodes.label: Notion Tool (httpx layer)
nodes.rationale: Tool layer kept separate from SDK service layer; has rate limiting with exponential backoff and auto-splits content over Notion's 2000-char block limit.

nodes.label: Notion Content DB (LinkedIn)
nodes.rationale: Free-tier Notion integration allows only 3 connected databases, so Routine/Research/Content were prioritized; YouTube DB deferred until plan upgrade.

nodes.label: Docker Compose Stack
nodes.rationale: Backend runs with a single uvicorn worker because the in-process APScheduler must not run in multiple workers (would double-fire the 5:30 AM / 10:30 PM cron jobs). Build context is repo root so backend.app.* and top-level memory/ both resolve.

nodes.label: Render Deployment (asta-backend web service)
nodes.rationale: Free-tier Docker deploy; POSTGRES_URL/REDIS_URL intentionally omitted — LangGraph checkpointer falls back to MongoDB and the Redis L1 cache fails open when unset. Wake word disabled server-side (WAKE_WORD_ENABLED=false).

nodes.label: Reminder Firing Pipeline
nodes.rationale: create -> add_one_time_reminder -> at fire time: WS broadcast + Notion status update; pending future reminders reloaded from Notion on startup so restarts don't drop reminders.

nodes.label: classify_intent Router
nodes.rationale: Regex guard was misrouting recall phrasing ('remind me what/who...') into routine_workflow; fixed to let recall fall through to the LLM classifier which returns 'other', and other_workflow's CHAT_SYSTEM tightened to refuse ungrounded recall instead of fabricating.

nodes.label: Firebase Admin SDK / FCM Push
nodes.rationale: Gracefully skipped until service-account.json is present, so deploys without Firebase credentials still boot.

hyperedges.label: End-to-End Voice Pipeline (wake word to TTS)
